title: ocimum angustifolium
intro: Ocimum angustifolium, also known as Narrow-leafed Basil, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ocimum angustifolium include relief from digestive issues, reduction of inflammation, and antimicrobial properties that help combat infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its various health benefits, and it is also used in culinary dishes for its flavorful leaves.
